Brilliant Diamond/Shining Pearl Gym Leaders & Elite Four

	Like the original games, in Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl you take on 8 gyms during the story, each specialising in a particular type. The gym leaders and their Pokémon are the same, although some have updated moves (plus type changes like Mr. Mime being Fairy type now). After the final gym you make your way to the Pokémon League to tackle the Elite Four and the Champion.

### Gym Leaders
[Roark](#gym-1) (Oreburgh City)[Gardenia](#gym-2) (Eterna City)[Maylene](#gym-3) (Veilstone City)[Crasher Wake](#gym-4) (Pastoria City)[Fantina](#gym-5) (Hearthome City)[Byron](#gym-6) (Canalave City)[Candice](#gym-7) (Snowpoint City)[Volkner](#gym-8) (Sunyshore City)
### Elite Four
[Aaron](#elite4-1)[Bertha](#elite4-2)[Flint](#elite4-3)[Lucian](#elite4-4)[Cynthia](#champion-5)[Other trainers](#trainers-misc)
